source_policy.operational_source_of_record: Yahoo provider/yfinance values written to data/marketdata/symbol_universe.csv
source_policy.web_reference_policy: Yahoo Japan and ETF web pages are used as sanity-check references. Exact parity is not required because trailing, forward, forecast, TTM, and update-timing definitions can differ by source.
source_policy.missing_value_policy: Unavailable provider fields remain blank and are displayed as N/A instead of being filled with zero.
source_policy.abnormal_value_policy: Dividend yield above 20%, PER <= 0 or > 200, PBR <= 0 or > 50, and ROE outside -100% to 100% are treated as abnormal for ranking metadata and kept out of display/ranking calculations.

post_refresh_cleanup.reason: Cleared values outside display/ranking guard ranges after live refresh.

notes: Chunked live refresh. Initial top-500 and representative-symbol writes were followed by stale-row batches of up to 500 symbols.
PARR and PASG failed during the first full batch run because of a transient provider connection reset, then succeeded in a targeted retry.
updates_requested/updates_applied/changed_rows count batch operations and may include repeated symbols from the representative refresh.
